use_cases: Displaying featured products in an e-commerce storefront with smooth carousel navigation
Showcasing product catalogs with hover animations to highlight individual items
Creating product grid sections with discount badges and delivery time indicators
Building responsive product browsing interfaces for online marketplaces
Displaying time-sensitive deals with animated product cards in retail applications
ai_summary: A reusable product carousel component with animated product cards featuring image zoom on hover, discount badges, delivery time indicators, and smooth scroll navigation. Built with Framer Motion and shadcn utilities for a clean, minimal e-commerce aesthetic suitable for showcasing product catalogs across desktop and mobile platforms.
